$comment: Technique catalogue for @cue-vin/css. Every entry maps 1:1 to a class that exists in ./cue.css. The vibe/avoid-when/pairs/never-pair fields are the taste layer — they tell AI agents which technique fits which product mood, not just what the class does mechanically. Categories: entrance | ambient | transition | layout | marquee | utility.

cue-group.timing: n/a (wrapper marker — no own styles, only activates .cue-ambient on :hover/:focus-within)

cue-pointer.timing: var(--cue-duration-normal, 300ms) for movement; var(--cue-duration-fast, 150ms) for transform

cue-glow-spot.timing: n/a (static glow) or var(--cue-gs-pulse-duration, 4s) infinite alternate for pulse variant

cue-words-rise.timing: var(--cue-word-duration, 600ms) per word with var(--cue-word-delay, 90ms) stagger

avoid-when: more than 1 element animating this way
list reveals that need crisp sequential feel
fixed 1-8 item lists (cue-stagger-1..8 is more discoverable)

cue-bars-bounce.timing: var(--cue-bars-duration, 2.24s) ease-in-out infinite alternate with var(--cue-bars-stagger, 80ms) delay

cue-stagger-reveal.timing: 3-stage: typing + fade body + grow detail, var(--cue-reveal-body-duration, 0.2s)

cue-hover-xray.timing: 0.4s content invert + 0.6s circle expand, shared 50ms delay, expo-out

cue-marquee-pair.timing: forward var(--cue-marquee-pair-forward, 60s) + reverse var(--cue-marquee-pair-reverse, 65s) linear infinite

avoid-when: text content that must be always 100% readable
text content that must be always 100% readable

cue-dropdown-clip.timing: Structure (clip-path, max-height) 200ms; visual polish (opacity, transform, height) 300ms — same cubic-bezier(0.45, 0.05, 0.55, 0.95)

cue-hero-stagger.timing: var(--cue-hero-stagger-duration, 0.3s) var(--cue-ease-snappy) forwards; delay = start + (--index × step)

cue-loader-dash-circle.timing: var(--cue-loader-dash-morph-duration, 1.5s) ease-in-out infinite (out-of-sync with parent rotation)

cue-arrow-draw-3key-head.timing: var(--cue-arrow-duration, 2.5s) ease-in-out infinite (head draws 23%→36%, overlapping stem)

cue-mask-wipe.timing: var(--cue-mask-wipe-duration, 1.5s) var(--cue-ease-quart) forwards — one-shot, not looping

cue-gradient-border.timing: n/a (static visual style via mask-composite: exclude)

cue-noise-overlay.timing: n/a (static texture overlay — requires companion SVG filter with id=cue-noise-filter in document)

cue-ease-tokens.timing: n/a (design-system easing tokens — reference via var(--cue-ease-*). Also exposes tokens in :root for global use.)

cue-aurora-dots.timing: var(--cue-aurora-duration, 10s) linear infinite when .is-active — asymmetric (rotate 50%, pause 50%)

cue-glass-button.timing: var(--cue-glass-duration, 0.3s) ease for background/box-shadow; :active adds 1px press

cue-scroll-fade.timing: n/a (static mask-image edge fade + cross-browser scrollbar hiding)

cue-state-transition.timing: var(--cue-state-duration, 300ms) var(--cue-ease-out) for opacity/transform; visibility 0s [0 or duration] for staggered swap

cue-state-transition-sm.timing: 200ms duration, 6px offset — for small UI like badges, status dots

cue-state-transition-lg.timing: 400ms duration, 16px offset — for large panels, mobile menus, full-screen overlays

avoid-when: compact UI elements (glow butuh area 200px+ untuk terlihat)
halaman dengan banyak card bersamaan (orbit glow akan compete untuk attention)
context di mana motion constant mengganggu reading (long-form articles, docs)
cue-orbit-glow.timing: var(--cue-orbit-duration, 20s) linear infinite (orbit); opacity fade var(--cue-orbit-fade, 0.5s)

avoid-when: multiple badges berdekatan (visual noise — pick one to shimmer)
static info badges (Announcement, Version — should not feel 'live')
cue-shimmer-border.timing: var(--cue-shimmer-duration, 5s) linear infinite — 45deg stripe sweep around pill border

avoid-when: text links (links should feel light, not clicky)
icon-only ghost buttons (no visual weight to communicate press)
context dengan banyak button berdekatan (asymmetric timing akan feel chaotic — gunakan single duration)
cue-button-tactile.timing: 3-state asymmetric: base 300ms, hover 75ms, active 150ms (1:2:4 ratio mimics physical switch)

avoid-when: mobile (height animation pada mobile sering janky — prefer transform/opacity)
headers dengan dynamic content (height harus fixed value untuk animatable)
frequent state toggles (0.5s duration terlalu slow untuk rapid toggles)

cue-scroll-counter.timing: Scroll-driven via animation-timeline: exit; steps(--cue-counter-start) easing snaps integers

cue-hover-shadow-has.timing: Asymmetric: fade-in 150ms ease-out (snappy), fade-out 200ms ease-in (patient) on ::after opacity only

cue-spring-linear.timing: var(--cue-spring-duration, 600ms) with var(--cue-spring-timing) — 16-anchor linear() curve, 6% overshoot

cue-offset-marquee.timing: var(--cue-marquee-duration, 30s) linear infinite (paused unless hovered) — Motion Path variant

cue-offset-marquee__item.timing: Same as parent cue-offset-marquee; each item follows polygon path via offset-path

cue-sprite--walk.timing: 0.5s per cycle, 4 iterations (2s total walk animation)

cue-sprite--jump.timing: 0.75s per cycle, 3 iterations (2.25s total jump animation)

cue-sprite--idle.timing: 2s per cycle, infinite iteration (ambient breathing/blink loop)

cue-snappy-fade.timing: var(--cue-snappy-duration, 80ms) var(--cue-snappy-ease, ease-in-out) — below 'smooth' threshold, reads as instant-but-smooth

cue-snappy-fade--scale.timing: 80ms opacity + 80ms scale(0.96 → 1) for subtle 'pop in' effect

cue-develop.timing: var(--cue-develop-duration, 1.5s) ease-out forwards, 3-stop keyframe (B&W overexposed → B&W → full color)

avoid-when: attention-demanding indicators (use cue-pulse or cue-glow instead — breathe is too subtle for alerts)
elements with text content (3% scale shift distorts text mid-cycle)
more than 8 breathing elements per viewport (creates subconscious unease)
elements in motion-heavy sections (compounds visual noise)
cue-breathe-scale.timing: var(--cue-breathe-duration, 3s) ease-in-out infinite — 3% amplitude scale pulse (below conscious perception)

cue-progress-timer.timing: var(--cue-progress-timer-duration, 6s) linear forwards — linear is critical for time indication

cue-progress-timer--vertical.timing: Same duration; animates height instead of width

cue-progress-timer--slow.timing: 10s duration — for long-form content (e.g., hero slides)

cue-progress-timer--scale-x.timing: Same duration; uses transform: scaleX(0 → 1) instead of width (compositor-only, no layout)

cue-progress-timer--gradient.timing: n/a (background variant — applies 2-stop linear gradient to bar)

avoid-when: interactive elements (drift makes click target unpredictable)
text content (drift on text feels jittery)
more than 12 floating elements per viewport (creates visual noise)
elements needing precise positioning (drift breaks alignment expectations)
cue-scattered-float.timing: var(--cue-float-duration, 8s) ease-in-out infinite — 4-stop non-symmetric position drift

avoid-when: flat 2D design systems (3D tilt will feel inconsistent)
small UI elements (tilt effect imperceptible below 100px)
cue-perspective-tilt-in.timing: var(--cue-tilt-duration, 0.2s) var(--cue-tilt-ease, ease-out) both — 3D rotateX(-10deg) → 0 + scale(.9) → 1

cue-perspective-tilt-out.timing: var(--cue-tilt-duration, 0.2s) var(--cue-tilt-ease, ease-out) both — rotateX(0) → -10deg + scale(1) → .95 (asymmetric)

cue-perspective-stage.timing: n/a (parent wrapper — sets perspective + perspective-origin for 3D children)

cue-content-swap.timing: var(--cue-swap-duration, 2s) linear infinite — 4-slot content: animation via pseudo-element

cue-content-swap--status.timing: Inherits parent; slot-2='⏳', slot-4='✓' (working → done cycle)

cue-hover-asymmetric.timing: Modifier: enter 0.45s easeOutExpo (slow, inviting); leave 0.2s easeOutExpo (quick, dismissive) — 2.25× ratio

cue-pulse-beam.timing: var(--cue-beam-duration, 8s) var(--cue-beam-ease, ease-out) infinite — translateY(0% → 200%) upward beam

cue-pulse-beam--double.timing: Adds second ::after pulse with delay offset = duration/3 for continuous stream

avoid-when: important content the user must read fully (dots may distract)
elements where width: 3ch causes unwanted whitespace when not loading
very fast cycles <1.5s (dots become a blur — use cue-spinner instead)
long text >30 chars (width: Nch may overflow container — use JS-driven typing instead)
proportional fonts with wide character variance
elements needing smooth reveal (use clip-path inset() instead — width is stepped)
interactive elements (typing animation blocks click target until complete)
cue-typewriter.timing: var(--cue-typewriter-duration, 500ms) steps(var(--cue-typewriter-chars, 4)) var(--cue-typewriter-delay, 0ms) forwards — ch-unit width

avoid-when: static content (no streaming semantic — use cue-enter-fade instead)
important content yang user must read immediately (white flash may distract)
non-text elements (color property only affects text and SVG fill)
dark themes with low-contrast currentColor (white-to-dark transition may be too dramatic)
cue-stream-color-handoff.timing: var(--cue-stream-duration, 500ms) linear forwards — Phase 1 (0-25%): white flash + opacity 0→1; Phase 2 (25-100%): color white→currentColor

cue-button-enable.timing: var(--cue-button-enable-duration, 0.35s) ease-out 1 — 3 parallel: scale 0.97→1.04→1, brightness 1.05→1, bg-position sweep 120%→-120%

avoid-when: high-frequency interaction buttons (save, submit) where 800ms feels sluggish
buttons with dynamic text that changes (data-text must stay in sync)
single-line status indicators that don't benefit from motion
cue-text-roll.timing: var(--cue-text-roll-duration, 0.8s) cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) easeOutExpo — 110% offset clears descenders

avoid-when: content-heavy reading sites where cursor obscures text
forms with text inputs (cursor interferes with caret visibility)
accessibility-first interfaces (custom cursors hurt some users)
cue-cursor-exclusion.timing: transform: var(--cue-cursor-transform-duration, 0.3s); opacity: var(--cue-cursor-opacity-duration, 0.1s); color/blend: 999999s delay freeze (instant snap)

avoid-when: simple mobile menus where 750ms feels slow (use simple rotate instead)
hamburger buttons with 3+ bars (keyframes assume 2 bars)
navigation that opens via slide-in panel (choreography competes with panel)
cue-hamburger-choreography.timing: var(--cue-hamburger-duration, 0.75s) forwards — 3-phase clip-path wipe + asymmetric top(30%)/bottom(50%) timing

avoid-when: data viz charts where stroke variation implies data (would be confusing)
performance-critical pages with 10+ SVG icons (animation cost adds up)
icons smaller than 24px (dash pattern not visible)
cue-stroke-morph.timing: var(--cue-stroke-morph-duration, 5s) linear infinite — dual motion: stroke-dashoffset (flow) + stroke-dasharray (breathe)

cue-gradient-text--saas.timing: Inherits parent; brand blue → teal → purple wash

avoid-when: static layouts with no scroll context

cue-boost-stagger.timing: Per-item self-stagger via --cue-item-index/--cue-item-total; window = index/total×0.7 to +0.3

cue-scroll-detect.timing: animation-timeline: scroll(nearest inline self); keyframe sets --cue-can-scroll truthy on scroll

avoid-when: selectable text where selection visibility matters

cue-mask-radial-fade.timing: n/a (static radial mask-image; center opaque → edge transparent)

cue-rotating-text.timing: var(--cue-rt-duration, 6.4s) linear var(--cue-rt-delay, 3s) infinite — paired keyframes spin+shift

cue-arrow-link.timing: var(--cue-arrow-link-duration, 0.2s) ease-out; 2-3px shift in data-dir direction

cue-tilt-stage.timing: n/a (3D stage container — sets perspective 4000px + preserve-3d)

cue-tilt-subject.timing: n/a (static 3D transform: translateX(-2%) scale(1.2) rotateX(47deg) rotateY(31deg) rotate(324deg))

cue-tilt-fade-y.timing: n/a (static gradient + masked backdrop-blur for bottom edge dissolve)

cue-tilt-fade-x.timing: n/a (static gradient + masked backdrop-blur for right edge dissolve)

cue-scramble.timing: CSS: data-scrambling toggles break-all; JS orchestrator (companion) handles char lock-in at ~40ms/char

cue-counter-spin.timing: var(--cue-counter-duration, 5s) linear infinite — conic-gradient arc + radial mask ring

cue-slide-pattern.timing: var(--cue-pattern-duration, 2s) linear infinite (paused default, running on cue-group:hover)

cue-live-dot.timing: var(--cue-live-duration, 1200ms) ease-in-out infinite — opacity 0.35↔1 + drop-shadow glow

cue-live-dot-svg.timing: Same as cue-live-dot; for SVG <circle> elements (no width/height, uses filter:drop-shadow only)

cue-lqip-cinematic.timing: 300ms opacity + 600ms transform scale(1.04→1) for focus-pull feel

cue-delay-swap.timing: background-color 0ms var(--cue-ds-wait, 300ms) — delayed instant snap; color 200ms ease-out

avoid-when: content that changes height after open

cue-pill-toggle-option.timing: var(--cue-duration-normal, 300ms) color + background-color transition; aria-selected drives active state

cue-scrollspy-item.timing: var(--cue-duration-normal, 300ms) color transition; aria-current/.is-active drives active

cue-spotlight.timing: Instant cursor tracking (no transform transition), var(--cue-spotlight-fade, 500ms) opacity fade

cue-shimmer-text.timing: var(--cue-shimmer-duration, 2.5s) linear infinite — 5-stop gradient + color-mix() highlight sweep

cue-submit-pulse.timing: var(--cue-submit-pulse-duration, 2s) linear infinite — opacity 1→0.3 aggressive dim

cue-mention-pill.timing: var(--cue-mention-pill-duration, 8s) ease-in-out infinite — 6-color lab() gradient round-trip shift

cue-card-fan.timing: var(--cue-fan-duration, 200ms) ease — 3-card fan with ±15deg rotation + diagonal offset

cue-parallax-bg.timing: n/a (background layer — position: absolute, object-fit: cover)

cue-parallax-content.timing: var(--cue-parallax-duration, 400ms) ease — transform transition on scroll offset (JS-driven)

cue-video-mockup.timing: n/a (static — mask-image clips video + OKLab gradient overlay)

cue-sticker.timing: var(--cue-sticker-duration, 150ms) ease — hard offset shadow + counter-rotation hover

cue-confetti-trig.timing: var(--cue-confetti-lifetime, 1s) cubic-bezier(0.4, -0.02, 0.07, 1.02) forwards — cos/sin radial burst

cue-button-conic-rotate.timing: var(--cue-conic-duration, 10s) linear infinite (paused default, running on :hover) — @property <angle> rotation

cue-tooltip-fade.timing: var(--cue-tooltip-duration, 0.2s) ease forwards — opacity-only, no transform

cue-state-cut.timing: 1ms steps(1) forwards — instant discrete CSS-var swap

cue-timeline-scope.timing: n/a (container — declares timeline-scope for cross-tree scroll animations)

cue-timeline-scope-consumer.timing: animation-timeline: --cue-timeline (driven by source element's scroll position)

cue-offset-move.timing: var(--cue-offset-duration, 10s) linear infinite — offset-distance along arbitrary path()

cue-offset-orbit.timing: var(--cue-offset-duration, 10s) linear infinite — circular orbit via offset-path: circle()

cue-offset-travel.timing: var(--cue-offset-duration, 2s) ease-out both — one-shot path traversal entrance

cue-melt.timing: var(--cue-melt-duration, 2s) ease forwards — clip-path:path() Bézier keyframe interpolation

cue-melt-overlay.timing: Inherits from cue-melt:hover — animates clip-path from drip-tips to full-coverage

cue-slide-nav.timing: var(--cue-duration-normal, 300ms) — opacity transition on rectangular bar pagination

cue-skeleton.timing: var(--cue-skeleton-duration, 1.5s) linear infinite — :has() auto-hide on data-loaded

cue-icon-swap.timing: var(--cue-icon-swap-duration, 0.2s) ease — paired scale+opacity crossfade, data-state driven

cue-overflow-detect.timing: animation-timeline: scroll(self inline) — sets --cue-has-overflow:1 only when element overflows

cue-conic-scan.timing: var(--cue-conic-scan-duration, 4s) linear forwards — 5-stop non-linear @property angle keyframe

cue-speech-bubble.timing: var(--cue-speech-bubble-duration, 300ms) ease-out forwards — translateY + scale overshoot + directional translateX

cue-jump-bounce--transform.timing: Same as cue-jump-bounce but uses transform: translateY (GPU-composited, no layout reflow)

cue-scroll-var-parallax.timing: Pure CSS calc() — JS writes --cue-progress 0→1, CSS does all parallax math

cue-scan-clip.timing: var(--cue-scan-clip-duration, 1.5s) ease-in-out infinite — 3-layer synchronized clip-path + translate

cue-jiggle.timing: var(--cue-jiggle-duration, 0.4s) ease-in-out — 10-stop alternating direction with decreasing amplitude

cue-spin-3d.timing: var(--cue-spin-3d-duration, 1s) ease-in-out infinite — rotateY 0→180deg with scale peak at midpoint

cue-pulse-border.timing: var(--cue-pulse-border-duration, 2s) ease-in-out infinite — border-color + box-shadow dual-state with 40/60 asymmetric hold

cue-square-accordion.timing: var(--cue-square-accordion-duration, 0.2s) ease-out forwards — height from width via calc(var(--width) - header-offset)

cue-carousel-depth.timing: 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.44, 0, 0.56, 1) — 3D elliptical with depth-of-field blur + correlated shadow
